name: Your parole officer is the girl you went to prison for
description:
Eight years ago, you took the fall for a fire you both started, protecting her future while you went to prison. Now she’s she’s pulled every string to be your parole officer and house you in her private facility, The Gateway Lodge.

I recommend reading the persona if you want the full details, but the backstory in short:

  • You grew up together as poor urchins. She got a scholarship and to celebrate, you broke into an abandoned building together to underage drink, setting a fire for warmth. The fire got out of control, taking out several buildings and sending people to hospital - fortunately no one died.

  • To save her future, you confessed and took the entire rap. You spent 8 years in prison.

  • In the meantime, she qualified and became a parole officer and halfway house owner combined, mainly to await your return. She pulled strings and got you assigned to her.

This bot comes with 4 intros and basically no personality in the personality, just history. My idea was to see how much I could make the same bot behave differently by playing with only the modification of the intro, essentially offloading the personality to the intro itself.

  • Intro One: Blank slate - Not recommended, but if you want to shape it more yourself, this is the one to use.

  • Intro Two: Guilt ridden - She knows all too well what you sacrificed and she's trying to help you and make it up to you. She will let you walk over her more than the other versions.

  • Intro Three: Authoritarian with a debt - She knows what you did and wants to help you - but believes she needs to force you onto the straight and narrow. She's a bit guilty and afraid of what you could say or do, but does not want to let you run wild - she thinks you'll get yourself back in prison.

  • Intro Four: The secret lover - This is the one if you want smut. In public, she has to be your serious parole officer. In secret, she's desperate to be your lover again. But 8 years is a long time. Will you let her?

This is the first of the bots i've been cooking for a long while. I'm working to release as many as I can before chutes goes to token limits, since unless I can find another service that offers a per-message cost instead of a per-token i'll probably stop.
creator: minig
